AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[ClosePanelTooltip]: Close the Advanced Road Naming panel.
AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[UndoWaypointToolti: Remove the most recently placed waypoint.
AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[ClearTooltip]: Clear the current road selection and input.
AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[ApplyTooltip]: Apply the current road naming operation to the selected route.
AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[PrefixDescriptionM: Motorway / Highway - Carries the most traffic in your city. High-speed, limited-access roads.
AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[PrefixDescriptionA: A-Road - Major arterial road connecting districts and suburbs. High traffic volume.
AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[PrefixDescriptionB: B-Road - Secondary road serving as an alternative to A-roads. Moderate traffic volume.
AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[PrefixDescriptionC: C-Road - Minor road connecting smaller points of interest. Low to moderate traffic.
AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[CustomPrefixToolti: Use a custom route prefix that you type yourself.
AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[PositionBeforeTool: Show the route number before the road name, for example M1 - Northern Hwy.
AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[PositionAfterToolt: Show the route number after the road name, for example Northern Hwy - M1.
AdvancedRoadNaming.UI[AutoRouteNumberToo: Pick the next available route number for the selected prefix.
